title: Digi Doods Virtual Pet (Styles Vary)
description: Product description Introducing Digi Doods, the super cute virtual reality pet, perfect for on the go fun! With over 186 pets for you to raise, care, feed and love this compact digi dood will provide your little one with hours of fun! One colour supplied at random. Pet Features: Happy/Sad Care Needed Reading Time Send a Message Speedo Health Food Time Play Time Wee/Poo Safety Warning Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years
